title: Doctor check: stable_id_collision
description: F20: rule-meta-builder.ts:372-382 silently overwrites duplicate stable_ids via Map.set last-wins. Add doctor check that detects two .md files declaring same `<!-- fab:rule-id X -->` and emits structured warning naming both file paths.
scope: Layer 2 P1 — doctor extension for non-deterministic rule-id collision

files.change: NEW non-fixable check `stable_id_collision`: scan rules dir; find duplicate stable_ids; warning includes ALL file paths declaring same id + action_hint 'Remove the duplicate from one file'
Test: 2 .md files with same fab:rule-id → check fires with both paths

criteria: Duplicate stable_ids detected and reported with file paths
Action hint clear about manual resolution
